Avetta Turkey Annual Update

### High Work Hours:

Are your hours and/or employee count entered correctly? The total number of hours reported are considerably *HIGHER* than the average annual hours typically worked by full-time employees.

Please validate that you have entered your correct employee count and/or total hours. If correct, provide a brief explanation for approval (this will be visible to your client connections). Otherwise, please correct your answers.

### Low Work Hours:

Are your hours and/or employee count entered correctly? The total number of hours reported are considerably *LOWER* than the average annual hours typically worked by full-time and part-time employees.

Please validate that you have entered your correct employee count and/or total hours. If correct, provide a brief explanation for approval (this will be visible to your client connections). Otherwise, please correct your answers.
An incident that results in a worker having a permanent physical or mental impairment that prevents them from performing their job duties.
Please enter the total number of permanent disability incidents for the given year.

An incident that results in a worker having a temporary physical or mental impairment that prevents them from performing their job duties for a period of time, but from which they are expected to recover fully.
Please enter the total number of temporary disability incidents for the given year.
Any intervention beyond first aid that requires professional medical assessment and treatment, but the worker may still be able to continue working or return to work soon after the treatment.
Please enter the number of *Medical treatment accidents* for the given year.
An incident that results in a worker developing an occupational illness, such as asthma or carpal tunnel syndrome.
Please enter the number of cases of Occupational Diseases/Illnesses for the given year.
Incidents that require first aid treatment only.
Please enter the number of First Aid cases for the given year.
Incidents that could have resulted in an occupational accident or illness, but did not.
Please enter the number of Dangerous Occurrences for the given year.
